name: SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePaymentServiceSelectionRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[] )
description: Creates a Payment Service Selection Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
